_publications._publicationTitle: Influences of RASopathies on Neuroanatomical Variation in Children.

_contextSnippet: Our vertex-wise group comparison analysis of RASopathies versus TD for SA resulted in alterations in several cortical regions ( cluster-based fwe p < 0.05 corrected )
details: Successfully performed cluster-based family-wise error correction (fwe p < 0.05 corrected) for multiple comparison correction in cortical surface area and thickness analyses.
